channel.title: chentsulin/awesome-graphql Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: chentsulin/awesome-graphql Feb 8th - Feb 14th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

Java Libraries

  • Elide: A Java library that can expose a JPA annotated data model as a GraphQL service over any relational database.

    • Services

  • Moesif API Analytics - A GraphQL analaytics and monitoring service to find functional and performance issues.
  • Booster framework - An open-source framework that makes you completely forget about infrastructure and allows you to focus exclusively on your business logic. It autogenerates a GraphQL API for your models, supporting mutations, queries, and subscriptions.
  • Hypi - Low-code, scalable, serverless backend as a service. Your GraphQL & REST over GraphQL backend in minutes.

    • Libraries

    PHP Libraries

  • GraPHPinatorstars10 - Easy-to-use GraphQL server implementation for modern PHP.

    • Libraries

    Ruby Libraries

  • graphql-authstars17 - A JWT auth wrapper working with devise.

    • Examples

    Ruby Examples

  • rails-devise-graphqlstars216 - A rails 6 boilerplate with devise, graphql & JWT auth.

    • GraphQL Meetups

  • Copenhagen

    • Databases

  • FaunaDB - Relational NoSQL database with GraphQL schema import. Supports joins, indexes, and multi-region ACID transactions with serverless pay-per-use pricing.
  • Weaviatestars1.2k - Weaviate is a cloud-native, modular, real-time vector search engine with a GraphQL interface built to scale your machine learning models.

    • Libraries

    Crystal Libraries

  • graphqlstars57 - GraphQL server library
  • graphql-crystalstars211 - library inspired by graphql-rubystars4.7k & go-graphqlstars248 & graphql-parserstars167
  • crystal-gqlstars2 - GraphQL client shard inspired by Apollo client
  • graphql.crstars0 - GraphQL shard

    • Community

  • GraphQL Weekly - A weekly newsletter highlighting resources and news from the GraphQL community

    • Tools

    Tools - Security

  • GraphQL Raider [BurpSuite](https://portswigger.net/burp
  • WAF for graphQL - Web Application Firewall for graphQL APIs
  • GraphQL Intruderstars6 - Plugin based python script to perform GraphQL vulnerability assessment.

    • Libraries

    Miscellaneous

  • graphql-ably-pubsub - Ably PubSub implementation for GraphQL to publish mutation updates and subscribe to the result through a subscription query.

    • Libraries

    Clients

  • Apollo Elements - GraphQL web components that work in any frontend framework.

    • Examples

    TypeScript Examples

  • GraphQL Starterstars23 - A boilerplate for TypeScript + Node Express + Apollo GraphQL APIs.

    • Books

  • Production Ready GraphQL by Marc-André Giroux

item.title: chentsulin/awesome-graphql Dec 28th - Jan 3rd, 2020
item.description:
Books

  • Practical GraphQL by Daniel Schmitz

item.title: chentsulin/awesome-graphql Aug 10th - Aug 16th, 2020
item.description:
Tools

Tools - Security

  • StackHawk - GraphQL Vulnerability Scanner - StackHawk
  • Tinfoil Security - GraphQL Security Scanner - Tinfoil Security
  • InQL Scanner inqlstars747

    • Blogs

    Blogs - Security

  • Discovering GraphQL Endpoints and SQLi Vulnerabilities
  • Securing GraphQL API
  • How to secure a GraphQL API (The Complete Vulnerability Checklist)
  • Security Points to Consider Before Implementing GraphQL

    • Libraries

    Go Libraries

  • Super Graph: Fetch data without code! Super Graph gives you a high performance GraphQL API without you having to write any code. GraphQL is automagically compiled into an efficient SQL query. Use it either as a library or a standalone service.

    • Posts

  • Using DataLoader to batch GraphQL requests

item.title: chentsulin/awesome-graphql Jun 15th - Jun 21st, 2020
item.description:
Libraries

Java Libraries

  • manifold-graphql - Comprehensive GraphQL client use. Schema-first. Type-safe GraphQL types, queries, and results, no code generators, no POJOs, no annotations. Excellent IDE support with IntelliJ IDEA. See the Java example below.

    • Examples

    Java Examples

  • manifold-graphql samplestars14 - A simple application, both client and server, demonstrating the Manifold GraphQL library.

item.title: chentsulin/awesome-graphql Feb 10th - Feb 16th, 2020
item.description:
Libraries

Python Libraries

  • pnp-graphqlstars2 - A Django integration for GraphQL with Graphene. It's fully plug and play type. No extra code needed to expose basic api with filtering, pagination and mutations.
  • django-graphql-authstars213 - Django registration and authentication with GraphQL.

    • Libraries

    Clients

  • graphql-pino-middlewarestars9 - GraphQL middleware to augment resolvers with pino logger
  • graphql-lightstep-middlewarestars5 - GraphQL middleware to instrument resolvers with lightstep traces

    • Posts

  • Fluent GraphQL clients: how to write queries like a boss

    • Libraries

    Miscellaneous

  • Preact-urql - Preact integration for urql.
  • graphql-letstars324 - A webpack loader to import type-protected codegen results directly from GraphQL documents

    • Libraries

    Scala Libraries

  • calibanstars606 - Caliban is a purely functional library for creating GraphQL backends in Scala.

    • Libraries

    Database & ORM

  • fireQLstars74 - A GraphQL API for Firebase (Firestore database), auto-hosted on cloud functions.

    • Libraries

    Android Libraries

  • apollo-androidstars2.7k - 📟 A strongly-typed, caching GraphQL client for Android, written in Java

    • Libraries

    iOS Libraries

  • apollo-iosstars3k - 📱 A strongly-typed, caching GraphQL client for iOS, written in Swift

    • Tools

  • GraphQL Fakerstars2.2k - 🎲 Mock or extend your GraphQL API with faked data. No coding required.
  • Insomnia - An full-featured API client with first-party GraphQL query editor
  • GraphQL Birdseye – View any GraphQL schema as a dynamic and interactive graph.

    • Examples

    Android Examples

  • apollo-frontpage-android-appstars2 - 📄 Apollo "hello world" app, for Android

    • Examples

    iOS Examples

  • frontpage-ios-appstars99 - 📄 Apollo "hello world" app, for iOS

    • GraphQL Meetups

  • Montreal

    • Libraries

    Kotlin Libraries

  • graphql-kotlinstars1.1k - GraphQL Kotlin implementation.

    • Community

  • Discord - Join #graphql on the ReactiFlux Discord server

    • Examples

    TypeScript Examples

  • Next.js Apollo TypeScript Starterstars139 - Next.js starter project focused on developer experience.

    • Videos

  • GraphQL: The Documentary

item.title: chentsulin/awesome-graphql Oct 21st - Oct 27th, 2019
item.description:
Libraries

SQL Libraries

  • subZero - GraphQL & REST API for your database

    • Posts

  • REST vs GraphQL
  • Authentication and Authorization for GraphQL APIs
  • Build a GraphQL API with Siler on top of Swoole

    • Libraries

    PHP Libraries

  • Silerstars1.1k - Plain-old functions providing a declarative API for GraphQL servers with Subscriptions support.

    • Examples

    PHP Examples

  • siler-graphgl - An example GraphQL server written with Siler

    • Libraries

    Python Libraries

  • graphql-corestars360 - GraphQL implementation for Python based on GraphQL.js v0.6.0 reference implementation
  • graphql-core-nextstars360 - Latest GraphQL implementation based on GraphQL.js v14.5.6 reference implementation

    • Examples

    Java Examples

  • graphql-spqr-samplesstars90 - An example GraphQL server written with Spring MVC and GraphQL-SPQR

    • Foundation

  • GraphQL Foundation - GraphQL Foundation under the Linux Foundation

    • Libraries

    Miscellaneous

  • graphql-yogastars6.4k - Fully-featured GraphQL Server with focus on easy setup, performance and great developer experience.

item.title: chentsulin/awesome-graphql Sep 16th - Sep 22nd, 2019
item.description:
Libraries

Julia Libraries

  • Diana.jlstars77 - A Julia GraphQL client/server implementation.

    • Posts

  • Create an infinite loading list with React and GraphQL

    • Libraries

    TypeScript Libraries

  • GraphQL Nexusstars2.3k - Declarative, code-first and strongly typed GraphQL schema construction for TypeScript & JavaScript.

    • Libraries

    Java Libraries

  • graphql-java-codegen-maven-pluginstars17 - Schema-first maven plugin for generating Java types and Resolver interfaces. Works perfectly in conjunction with graphql-java-tools. Inspired by swagger-codegen-maven-plugin.
  • graphql-java-codegen-gradle-pluginstars21 - Schema-first gradle plugin for generating Java types and Resolver interfaces. Works perfectly in conjunction with graphql-java-tools. Inspired by gradle-swagger-generator-pluginstars203.

    • Examples

    Python Examples

  • swapi-graphenestars171 - A GraphQL schema and server using Graphene.

    • Libraries

    ReasonML Libraries

  • reason-urqlstars208 - ReasonML binding for urql Client

item.title: chentsulin/awesome-graphql Sep 2nd - Sep 8th, 2019
item.description:
Tools

  • VulcanJS - The full-stack React+GraphQL framework

item.title: chentsulin/awesome-graphql Aug 19th - Aug 25th, 2019
item.description:
Tools

  • OpenAPI-to-GraphQLstars1k - Take any OpenAPI Specification (OAS) or swagger and create a GraphQL interface - Two minute video and resources here
  • Apollo Client Developer Toolsstars1.2k - GraphQL debugging tools for Apollo Client in the Chrome developer console

    • GraphQL Meetups

  • Singapore
  • Zurich

    • Services

  • FakeQL - GraphQL API mocking as a service ... because GraphQL API mocking should be easy!

    • Libraries

    iOS Libraries

  • ApolloDeveloperKitstars54 - Apollo Client Devtools bridge for [Apollo iOS].

    • Libraries

    Miscellaneous

  • reactive-graphqlstars55 - Implementation of GraphQL based on RxJS and that supports live queries.

item.title: chentsulin/awesome-graphql Jul 8th - Jul 14th, 2019
item.description:
Libraries

Clients

  • mst-gqlstars568 - Bindings for mobx-state-tree and GraphQL

    • Databases

  • ArangoDB - Native multi-model database with GraphQL integration via the built-in Foxx Microservices Framework.

item.title: chentsulin/awesome-graphql Jul 1st - Jul 7th, 2019
item.description:
Libraries

C/C++ Libraries

  • CaffQLstars16 - Generates C++ client types and request/response serialization from a GraphQL introspection query.

item.title: chentsulin/awesome-graphql Jun 24th - Jun 30th, 2019
item.description:
Libraries

D (dlang) Libraries

  • graphqldstars25 - GraphQL server library for D.

item.title: chentsulin/awesome-graphql Jun 17th - Jun 23rd, 2019
item.description:
Libraries

Rust Libraries

  • juniperstars3.7k - GraphQL server library for Rust.
  • graphql-clientstars642 - GraphQL client library for Rust with WebAssembly (wasm) support.
  • graphql-parserstars209 - A parser, formatter and AST for the GraphQL query and schema definition language for Rust.

    • Libraries

    Python Libraries

  • Ariadnestars1.3k - library for implementing GraphQL servers using schema-first approach. Asynchronous query execution, batteries included for ASGI, WSGI and popular webframeworks, fully documented.

    • Tools

  • SwitchQLstars91 - Automated transcription of database schemas into GraphQL schemas, resolvers, queries, and mutations

    • Services

  • AWS AppSync - Scalable managed GraphQL service with subscriptions for building real-time and offline-first apps
  • FastQL - CDN specifically for GraphQL applications

item.title: chentsulin/awesome-graphql May 20th - May 26th, 2019
item.description:
Community

  • Bookmarks.dev - Dev bookmarks. Use the tag graphql

item.title: chentsulin/awesome-graphql May 6th - May 12th, 2019
item.description:
Databases

  • EdgeDB - The next generation object-relational database with native GraphQL support.

    • Community

  • GraphQL Jobs - A list of GraphQL-based jobs in startups all over the world.

item.title: chentsulin/awesome-graphql Apr 29th - May 5th, 2019
item.description:
Libraries

Miscellaneous

  • GraphQL Jokerstars73 - The ultimate GraphQL scaffolding tool.

item.title: chentsulin/awesome-graphql Apr 22nd - Apr 28th, 2019
item.description:
Libraries

Dart Libraries

  • Angel GraphQLstars115 - GraphQL server implementation with bindings

item.title: chentsulin/awesome-graphql Apr 15th - Apr 21st, 2019
item.description:
Libraries

HTTP Server Bindings

  • graphql-api-koastars46 - GraphQL Koa middleware that implements GraphQL.js from scratch and supports native ESM.

item.title: chentsulin/awesome-graphql Apr 8th - Apr 14th, 2019
item.description:
GraphQL Meetups

  • Amsterdam
  • Wrocław

item.title: chentsulin/awesome-graphql Apr 1st - Apr 7th, 2019
item.description:
Libraries

PHP Libraries

  • GraphQLitestars383 - Framework agnostic library that allows you to write GraphQL server by annotating your PHP classes.

    • Libraries

    Elm Libraries

  • elm-graphqlstars679 - GraphQL for Elm.

    • Libraries

    ReasonML Libraries

  • reason-apollostars564 - ReasonML binding for Apollo Client
  • ReasonQLstars97 - Type-safe and simple GraphQL Client for ReasonML developers.

item.title: chentsulin/awesome-graphql Mar 25th - Mar 31st, 2019
item.description:
Tools

  • graphql-typed-clientstars196 - A tool that generates a strongly typed client library for any GraphQL endpoint. The client allows writing GraphQL queries as plain JS objects (with type safety and awesome code completion experience)

    • Libraries

    Ruby Libraries

  • GQListars187 - A GraphQL client and DSL. Allowing to write queries in native Ruby.

    • Books

  • The GraphQL Guide by John Resig and Loren Sands-Ramshaw
  • Learning GraphQL by Eve Porcello and Alex Banks
  • Craft GraphQL APIs in Elixir with Absinthe by Bruce Williams and Ben Wilson
  • The Road to GraphQL
  • Fullstack GraphQL by Julian Mayorga
  • Learning GraphQL and Relay by Samer Buna

item.title: chentsulin/awesome-graphql Mar 18th - Mar 24th, 2019
item.description:
Libraries

Miscellaneous

  • GraphiteJSstars119 - Framework NodeJS for GraphQl.
  • Strapi - Open-source Node.js framework that supports "GraphQL" out of the box.
  • graphql-toolsstars4.1k - Tool library for building and maintaining GraphQL-JS servers.
  • graphql-anywhere - Run a GraphQL query anywhere, against any data, with no schema.
  • graphql-tagstars1.9k - A JavaScript template literal tag that parses GraphQL queries.
  • graphql-composestars972 - Tool which allows you to construct flexible graphql schema from different data sources via plugins.

    • Libraries

    Scala Libraries

  • sangriastars1.8k - Scala GraphQL server implementation.

    • Libraries

    Elixir Libraries

  • graphql-elixirstars857 - GraphQL Elixir. (No longer maintained)

    • Libraries

    C/C++ Libraries

  • cppgraphqlgenstars172 - C++ GraphQL schema service generator.

    • Libraries

    PHP Libraries

  • laravel-graphqlstars1.8k (abandoned) - Facebook GraphQL for Laravel 5.
  • Railtstars353 - High quality and loosely coupled framework for developing GraphQL applications using all the modern qualities of the language.
  • digiaonlinestars217 - Yet another PHP port of GraphQL reference implementation.
  • GraphQLstars716 (abandoned) - Well documented PHP implementation with no dependencies.
  • graphql-relay-phpstars267 - Relay helpers for webonyx/graphql-php implementation of GraphQL.
  • graphql-mapperstars30 (abandoned) - This library allows to build a GraphQL schema based on your model.
  • GraphQL Symfony Bundlestars290 - GraphQL Bundle for the Symfony 3 (supports 2.6+).
  • graphql-wpstars304 - WordPress plugin that exposes a GraphQL endpoint.

    • Tools

  • Bitstars13.4k - Organize GraphQL API as components to be consumed with NPM or modified from any project (example).
  • eslint-plugin-graphqlstars1.1k - An ESLint plugin that checks your GraphQL strings against a schema.
  • GraphQL IDEstars969 - An extensive IDE for exploring GraphQL API's.

    • Examples

    Scala Examples

  • sangria-akka-http-examplestars241 - An example GraphQL server written with akka-http and sangria

    • Blogs

  • Official GraphQL blog
  • Building Apollo

    • Libraries

    Java Libraries

  • graphql-spqrstars867 - Java 8+ API for rapid development of GraphQL services.
  • graphql-java-annotationsstars321 - Provides annotations-based syntax for schema definition with GraphQL Java.
  • graphql-java-toolsstars682 - Schema-first graphql-java convenience library that makes it easy to bring your own implementations as data resolvers. Inspired by graphql-toolsstars4.1k for JS.
  • graphql-java-servletstars175 - A framework-agnostic java servlet for exposing graphql-java query endpoints with GET, POST, and multipart uploads.
  • Light Java GraphQLstars26: A lightweight, fast microservices framework with all cross-cutting concerns addressed and ready to plug in GraphQL schema.

    • Libraries

    SQL Libraries

  • PostGraphilestars10.2k - Lightning-fast GraphQL APIs for PostgreSQL: highly customisable; extensible via plugins; realtime.

    • Libraries

    Ruby Libraries

  • agoostars691 - Ruby web server that implements Facebook's GraphQL.

    • Examples

    Ruby Examples

  • agoo-demo - Use of the Agoo server to demonstrate a simple GraphQL application.

    • Specification

  • facebook/graphql - Working Draft of the Specification for GraphQL created by Facebook.

    • Community

  • StackOverflow - Questions and answers. Use the tag graphql
  • /r/GraphQL - A Subreddit for interesting and informative GraphQL content and discussions.

    • Libraries

    Clients

  • graphql-requeststars3.5k - A minimal GraphQL client for Node and browsers.
  • graphql-hooksstars1.5k - Minimal hooks-first GraphQL client with caching and server-side rendering support.

    • Libraries

    Python Libraries

  • django-graphiqlstars34 - Integrate GraphiQL easily into your Django project.
  • python-graphql-clientstars136 - Simple GraphQL client for Python 2.7+
  • tartiflettestars741 - GraphQL Implementation, SDL First, for python 3.6+ / asyncio.
  • tartiflette-aiohttpstars52 - Wrapper of Tartiflette to expose GraphQL API over HTTP based on aiohttp / 3.6+ / asyncio, official tutorial available on tartiflette.io.

    • Libraries

    Go Libraries

  • graphql-gostars3.7k - GraphQL server with a focus on ease of use.

    • Examples

    JavaScript Examples

  • graphql-starter-kitstars3.2k - Project template for building a GraphQL server with Node.js v7+ and JavaScript
  • graphql-introstars88 - https://medium.com/the-graphqlhub/your-first-graphql-server-3c766ab4f0a2

    • Examples

    Java Examples

  • light-java-graphql examples - Examples of Light Java GraphQL and tutorials.

    • Posts

  • Introducing Relay and GraphQL
  • GraphQL Introduction
  • Your First GraphQL Server
  • 4 Reasons you should try out GraphQL
  • GraphQL at The Financial Times
  • From REST to GraphQL
  • GraphQL: A data query language
  • Subscriptions in GraphQL and Relay
  • The GitHub GraphQL API
  • Testing a GraphQL Server using Jest
  • How to implement viewerCanSee in GraphQL

    • Services

  • DatoCMS - CDN-based GraphQL based Headless Content Management System.

    • Videos

  • Build a GraphQL Server
  • GraphQL Tutorial

item.title: chentsulin/awesome-graphql Mar 4th - Mar 10th, 2019
item.description:
Libraries

Database & ORM

  • graphql-bookshelfstars186 - Some help defining GraphQL schema around BookshelfJS models.
  • graphql-sequelizestars1.8k - Sequelize helpers for GraphQL.
  • graphql-thinkystars76 - Build an optimized GraphQL schema from Thinky RethinkDB models.
  • graphql-tools-sequelizestars90 - OO-style schema definition functions and schema resolver functions for GraphQL-Tools using Sequelize ORM
  • graysql-orm-loaderstars12 - A GraysQL extension to load a GraphQL schema from an ORM.

    • Libraries

    Clojure Libraries

  • Laciniastars1.6k - GraphQL implementation in pure Clojure.
  • graphql-querystars55 - Clojure(Script) GraphQL query generation.

    • Libraries

    ClojureScript Libraries

  • re-graphstars375 - A GraphQL client for ClojureScript with bindings for re-frame applications.
  • graphql-querystars55 - Clojure(Script) GraphQL query generation.

    • Examples

    Clojure Examples

  • Clojure Game Geekstars34 - Example code for the Lacinia GraphQL framework tutorial.

    • Libraries

    Clients

  • Apollo Clientstars16.1k - A fully-featured, production ready caching GraphQL client for every UI framework and GraphQL server.

    • Libraries

    HTTP Server Bindings

  • koa-graphqlstars793 - GraphQL Koa Middleware.

    • Libraries

    Miscellaneous

  • GraphQL.jsstars17.6k - A reference implementation of GraphQL for JavaScript.

item.title: chentsulin/awesome-graphql Feb 25th - Mar 3rd, 2019
item.description:
Libraries

SQL Libraries

  • Hasurastars21.6k - Hasura gives Instant Realtime GraphQL APIs over PostgreSQL. Works with an existing database too.

item.title: chentsulin/awesome-graphql Jan 28th - Feb 3rd, 2019
item.description:
Tools

  • GraphQL Inspector - Tooling for GraphQL. Compare schemas, validate documents, find breaking changes, find similar types, schema coverage.
  • GRAPHQL DESIGNER - A developer's web-app tool to rapidly prototype a full stack CRUD implementation of GraphQL with React.

    • Libraries

    Miscellaneous

  • graphql-normalizrstars176 - Normalize GraphQL responses for persisting in the client cache/state

    • Libraries

    PHP Libraries

  • lighthousestars2.4k - A PHP package that allows to serve a GraphQL endpoint from your Laravel application.

    • Libraries

    Clients

  • Grafoostars265 - A tiny yet fully fledged cache based GraphQL client

    • Blogs

  • The Guild blog

    • Libraries

    .NET Libraries

  • graphql-netstars865 - GraphQL to IQueryable for .NET.
  • Hot Chocolatestars2.3k - GraphQL server for .Net Core and .NET Framework.

item.title: chentsulin/awesome-graphql Dec 31st - Jan 6th, 2018
item.description:
Community

  • Twitter - Use the hashtag #graphql

    • GraphQL Meetups

  • Bangalore

    • Tools

  • Prismastars11k - Turn your database into a GraphQL API. Prisma lets you design your data model and have a production ready GraphQL API online in minutes.

    • Workshoppers

  • How to GraphQL - Fullstack Tutorial Website with Tracks for all Major Frameworks & Languages including React, Apollo, Relay, JavaScript, Ruby, Java, Elixir and many more

item.title: chentsulin/awesome-graphql Dec 17th - Dec 23rd, 2018
item.description:
Libraries

Go Libraries

  • GQLGenstars5.9k - Go generate based graphql server library.
  • machinebox/graphqlstars699 - Simple low-level GraphQL client for Go
  • graphqlstars52 - GraphQL parser and server for Go.

    • Workshoppers

  • GraphQL of Thrones - Total beginner tutorial focused on just GraphQL without all the tooling. Alternates between LEARN and PLAY modes roleplaying as Game of Thrones characters.
  • Let's Learn GraphQL - Lessons/walkthrough of GraphQL concepts.

    • Libraries

    Miscellaneous

  • type-o-ramastars221 - JS type systems interportability.
  • Join Monsterstars2.3k - A GraphQL-to-SQL query execution layer for batch data fetching.

    • Tools

  • tuqlstars536 - Automatically create a GraphQL server from any sqlite database.
  • Swagger to GraphQLstars821 - GraphQL types builder based on REST API described in Swagger. Allows to migrate to GraphQL from REST for 5 minutes
  • GraphQL Voyagerstars6k - Represent any GraphQL API as an interactive graph.
  • GraphQL Docs - Instantly create beautiful GraphQL API docs hosted online.
  • ts-graphql-pluginstars491 - A language service plugin complete and validate GraphQL query in TypeScript template strings.
  • Apollo Tracingstars420 - GraphQL extension that enables you to easily get resolver-level performance information as part of a GraphQL response.
  • Altair GraphQL Clientstars3.3k - A beautiful feature-rich GraphQL Client for all platforms.
  • Apollo Storybook Decoratorstars334 - Wrap your React Storybook stories with Apollo Client, provide mocks for isolated UI testing with GraphQL
  • GraphQL Metrics - instrument GraphQL resolvers, logging response times and statuses (if there was an error or not) to the console as well as to InfluxDB.
  • GraphQL Roverstars245 - GraphQL schema interactive navigation, rearrange nodes, search and explore types and fields.
  • json-graphql-serverstars1.4k - Get a full fake GraphQL API with zero coding in less than 30 seconds, based on a JSON data file.
  • RAN Toolkitstars2.1k - Production-ready toolkit/boilerplate with support for GraphQL, SSR, Hot-reload, CSS-in-JS, caching, and more.
  • Apollo GraphQL VSCode Extension - Rich editor support for GraphQL client and server development that seamlessly integrates with the Apollo platform

    • Examples

    JavaScript Examples

  • graffiti-todostars59 - Example Relay TodoMVC application using graffiti-mongoose. WARNING Graffiti is no longer actively maintained. For hobbyist only.
  • swapi-graphqlstars936 - A GraphQL schema and server wrapping swapi.co.
  • UniversalRelayBoilerplatestars698

    • Community

  • GraphQL APIsstars3.2k - A collective list of public GraphQL APIs
  • GraphQL World - The fastest growing community of GraphQL developers
  • Slack - Share and help people on the chat. Get your invite here

    • GraphQL Meetups

  • Berlin
  • Buenos Aires
  • Dallas-Fort Worth
  • London
  • Manchester
  • Melbourne
  • Munich
  • New York City
  • San Francisco
  • Seattle
  • Sydney
  • Tel Aviv
  • Toronto

    • Libraries

    Clients

  • relaystars15.7k - Relay is a JavaScript framework for building data-driven React applications.
  • aws-amplifystars8k - A client library developed by Amazon for caching, analytics and more that includes a way to fetch GraphQL queries.
  • FetchQLstars179 - A simple GraphQL query client using Fetch.
  • urqlstars5.9k - A simple caching GraphQL client for React.
  • micro-graphql-reactstars517 - A lightweight utility for adding GraphQL to React. components. Includes simple caching and uses GET requests that could additionally be cached through a service-worker.
  • Lokkastars1.5k - Simple JavaScript client for GraphQL, which you can use anywhere.
  • react-reachstars138 - A library to communicate with Graphql through Redux.

    • Libraries

    Python Libraries

  • graphene-djangostars3.5k - A Django integration for Graphene.
  • Flask-GraphQL-Authstars57 - An authentication library for Flask inspired from flask-jwt-extended.

    • Libraries

    Relay Related

  • react-relay-network-layerstars275 - A network layer for Relay with query batching and middleware support (urlThunk, retryThunk, auth, defer and other).
  • relay-subscriptionsstars182 - Subscription support for Relay.

    • Libraries

    PHP Libraries

  • graphql-bundlestars36 - GraphQL Bundle for Symfony 2.

    • Libraries

    Java Libraries

  • gaphql-java-type-generatorstars35 - Auto-generates types for use with GraphQL Java
  • graphql-spring-bootstars169 - GraphQL and GraphiQL Spring Framework Boot Starters.

    • Libraries

    Swift Libraries

  • GraphQLstars815 - The Swift implementation for GraphQL.

    • Databases

  • Dgraph - Scalable, distributed, low latency, high throughput Graph database with GraphQL as the query language

    • Examples

    Ruby Examples

  • [to_eat_app] (https://github.com/jcdavison/to_eat_appstars12) - A sample graphql/rails/relay application with a related 3-part article series.

item.title: chentsulin/awesome-graphql Mar 6th - Mar 12th, 2017
item.description:
Examples

TypeScript Examples

  • Basic Apollo Serverstars169 - Basic Starter for Apollo Server, Using typescript and Webpack.

item.title: chentsulin/awesome-graphql Jan 23rd - Jan 29th, 2017
item.description:
Tools

item.title: chentsulin/awesome-graphql Oct 17th - Oct 23rd, 2016
item.description:
Libraries

Java Libraries

  • schemagen-graphqlstars43 - Schema generation and execution package that turns POJO's into a GraphQL Java queryable set of objects. Enables exposing any service as a GraphQL service using Annotations.

    • Tools

  • AST Explorer - Select "GraphQL" at the top, explore the GraphQL AST and highlight different parts by clicking in the query.

    • Libraries

    Miscellaneous

  • graphql-iso-datestars489 - A GraphQL date scalar type to be used with GraphQL.js. This scalar represents a date in the ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DD.
  • gql-toolsstars21 - Tool library with CLI for schema generation and manipulation.
  • graphql-pouchstars192 - A GraphQL-API runtime on top of PouchDB created by GraphQL shorthand notation as a self contained service with CouchDB synchronization.

    • Libraries

    Relay Related

  • Portfolio Relay Examplestars12 - An example website that fetches data from various apis and uses Relay and GraphQL to feed the data to React components!

    • Posts

  • Github GraphQL API React Example

    • Libraries

    PHP Libraries

  • eZ Platform GraphQL Bundle - GraphQL Bundle for the eZ Platform Symfony CMS.
